concerns.text: FR-005 mandates a sensitivity analysis on decision thresholds (sweeping {0.01, 0.05, 0.1}) but lacks an explicit anchor to a User Story. While SC-005 and US-3 discuss sensitivity, FR-005 does not contain a 'See US-3' or equivalent traceability clause, creating a potential orphaned requirement.

The Edge Case regarding 'collinear predictors' (flagging definitionally related predictors) describes a specific system behavior and diagnostic output. This requirement is not explicitly covered by any User Story (US-1, US-2, US-3) nor is it backed by a specific FR or SC, representing a silent under-specification of a critical data integrity check.
